question: Corporate governance refers to
options: To evaluate the effectiveness and efficiency of organisational processes
To provide shareholders and the public with a full account of the organisation's performance
The system of rules and practices by which a company is directed and controlled
Plan, Do, Check, Act — a continuous improvement model
answer: The system of rules and practices by which a company is directed and controlled

question: The Freedom of Information Act enables
options: Citizens to request access to government-held information
All parties affected by an organisation's decisions and their level of interest
To evaluate the effectiveness and efficiency of organisational processes
Ensures the organisation complies with legal and regulatory requirements
answer: Citizens to request access to government-held information

question: The concept of 'paperless office' involves
options: Flexible approach where employees work where and when they are most productive
Citizens to request access to government-held information
Replacing physical documents with digital alternatives entirely
To evaluate the effectiveness and efficiency of organisational processes
answer: Replacing physical documents with digital alternatives entirely

question: Enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems
options: Integrating digital technology into all aspects of business operations
To evaluate the effectiveness and efficiency of organisational processes
The system of rules and practices by which a company is directed and controlled
Integrate all core business processes into one unified system
answer: Integrate all core business processes into one unified system
